items.name: Hummus

items.description: Smoky roasted aubergine blended with tahini, lemon juice, and garlic.

items.name: Dolma
items.description: Hand-rolled vine leaves stuffed with fragrant herbed rice, slow-cooked to perfection.

items.description: Freshly baked bread infused with roasted garlic butter and herbs.

items.description: Golden garlic bread topped with melted cheese, fresh from the oven.

items.description: A generous selection of our finest mezze — hummus, baba ghanoush, dolma, cacik, and fresh bread.

items.description: Ripe tomatoes, cucumber, Kalamata olives, red onion, and a generous slab of feta in olive oil.

items.description: Tender lamb chops marinated in herbs and spices, seared over high-heat charcoal flames.

items.name: Lamb Ribs
items.description: Fall-off-the-bone lamb ribs slow-cooked then finished over charcoal for a caramelised crust.

items.description: Crispy chicken wings marinated in our house spice blend and char-grilled to smoky perfection.

items.description: Thick-cut halloumi slices grilled until golden and served with a drizzle of honey and herbs.

items.description: Our signature sharing platter — Chicken Shish, Shish Kebab, Lamb Ribs and your choice of side.

items.description: A grand feast for four — the full Liora charcoal grill experience with all our signature meats.

items.description: Slow-roasted half chicken seasoned with Mediterranean herbs, charcoal-finished for crispy skin.

items.description: A whole rotisserie chicken, golden and fragrant, perfect for sharing.

items.description: Our signature döner — a chef's secret spice blend makes this our most-loved dish.
